parameters.command:
node -e "const os=require('os');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const n=os.cpus().length;const load=os.loadavg()[0];const cpu=Math.min(100,Math.round((load/n)*100));const t=os.totalmem();const f=os.freemem();const usedMb=Math.round((t-f)/1024/1024);const totalMb=Math.round(t/1024/1024);const pct=Math.round((t-f)/t*100);let d={usedGb:0,totalGb:0,percent:0};try{const o=execSync('df -k /').toString();const L=o.trim().split(/\\n/)[1];if(L){const P=L.split(/\\s+/);const usedK=parseInt(P[2],10);const totalK=parseInt(P[1],10);d={usedGb:Math.round(usedK/1024/1024*100)/100,totalGb:Math.round(totalK/1024/1024*100)/100,percent:parseInt(P[5],10)||0};}}catch(e){}
console.log(JSON.stringify({metrics:{cpu:{percent:cpu},memory:{usedMb,totalMb,percent:pct},disk:d,n8nWorkers:{active:0,idle:0,busy:0,total:0}},history:[]}));"

nodes.name: Coletar métricas (Execute Command)
nodes.notes: Requer n8n com Execute Command habilitado (não disponível no n8n Cloud). Roda no container do n8n.
